channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding, 23rd July
item.description:
The pavements in both newmarsh Road and Geasshaven way have been neglected of weeding . Some are huge and will start damaging paving slabs .
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newmarsh Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fkytipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Accumulated rubbish on council land outside blocked in underpass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newmarsh Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping waste under tree, 23rd July
item.description:
This is regular occurrence from someone who lives on the street - leaving their rubbish under this tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gayhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car seat, booster seat and other rubbish dumped, 23rd July
item.description:
A child car seat and booster seat and some other associated rubbish has been dumped in Kelsey Lane near where it joins Kelsey Way, BR3 3LL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 23rd July
item.description:
Pizza boxes and bottles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linsey Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Group of men sitting around using balloon gas etc, 23rd July
item.description:
Group of about 10 men sitting there breathing in the balloon gas they have put an armchair there too. Not very nice for people walking past. Police probably need to investigate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bliss Crescent, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, four wheel trailer, waste mountains of garbage all around it has been here months, 23rd July
item.description:
Opposite side of the road from the shell garage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and lots of litter around, 23rd July
item.description:
Overflowing litter bin on Croydon road side and another near the tennis courts. Lots of bits of rubbish all around the park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches are forming out of the concrete pillars, 23rd July
item.description:
Branches/weeds are coming out of the concrete pillars on Vauxhall Bridge on all four at both ends there’s rubbish all over the bridge by the metal barriers on both sides over the entire bridge. There is graffiti on the bridge both sides both ends. I travel over the bridge every day and potholes appear every day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vauxhall Bridge, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised tarmac lump outside driveway, 23rd July
item.description:
A raised lump of tarmac outside driveway of 290 is a hazard as someone can trip and have a fall and causing problems when moving cars in and out of the driveway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 286, Baring Road, Chinbrook, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lane markings, stop lines, direction arrows, destination wording all erased, 23rd July
item.description:
Lane markings, stop lines, direction arrows, destination wording all erased
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): City Road, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spilt paint, 23rd July
item.description:
Blue paint spilt at road side Albany Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Steynton Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 23rd July
item.description:
Glass in kids park Stinging nettles Over grown weeds

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastney Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faulty traffic lights, 23rd July
item.description:
Traffic lights are not fully facing the oncoming traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fernhead Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stones and sand on carriageway, 23rd July
item.description:
Debris from recent water burst. Please can tbe road be cleaned?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): School Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Detritus in carriageway, 23rd July
item.description:
Please clear detritus in carriageway near mini roaundabout on southborough lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish at the corner of Lausanne Road and Duckett common, 23rd July
item.description:
It’s been there a few weeks now I keep passing it thinking I should do something about it and only got around to it today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willoughby Road, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor maintenance of communal areas, including dirty stairwells, a lift regularly soiled with urine and rubbish, and repeated rat and mice sightings, creating serious hygiene and safety concerns for residents., 23rd July
item.description:
I would like to respectfully bring to your attention the ongoing condition of the communal areas on the estate. For several weeks, and in some cases months, the stairwells have regularly been left with litter, rubbish, and dirt without being cleaned proper
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: State of park area, 23rd July
item.description:
1. Some litter bins overflowing/near full 2. Litterpick needed, litter strewn all over 3. Broken bench in the bush 4. Lots of cigarette butts discarded Can this area please have a tidy up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Western Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
